seo.title: Max Carter | undivisible.dev
seo.description: Rust-first tooling: Crepuscularity (GPUI + webext), Equilibrium FFI, Wax, Atechnology company, and miniapps.

props.headline: Hi, I'm Max Carter.
props.subheadline: I ship systems software in Rust. __CREPUS__ is the world's first GPUI runtime and component stack with live template hot reload: the same tree drives native desktop UI, and you author it with an extremely approachable surface—__CREPUS_DSL__ as our almost-syntaxless, indentation-first frontend language, plus __CREPUS_REACT__ so the component model stays familiar. __CREPUS_WEBEXT__ is the first plug-and-play, non–JS/TS web-extension framework for MV3: write extension UI and glue in Rust and __CREPUS_DSL__, ship a compliant bundle without a separate JS bundler story. __EQUILIBRIUM__ is the world's first FFI system that takes C-compiling languages and lets you call them from Rust like ordinary, plug-and-play native libraries—generated bindings instead of hand-written glue. I helped build __WAX__, a Homebrew-compatible package manager with parallel downloads that is typically about 3–20× faster than Homebrew on comparable installs, plus distribution through __SEMI_TAP__ and __UNDI_TAP__. __ATECH__ (__GH_ATECH_ORG__) is where we're building a web-AI-native operating system on Zircon, a Vision Pro HUD, Apple-style native syncing across devices, a spatial web platform that makes 3D sites and experiences accessible broadly, and a browser engine path pairing __GH_ATECH_SERVO__ with __GH_ATECH_V8__. On the side I publish small miniapps—see __GH_PROFILE__ for the full list—including __MINI_ANYWHERE__ (chat surfaces that render interactive artifacts), __MINI_POKE__, __MINI_UNTHINKMAIL__, __MINI_BUBLIK__, and __MINI_ALPHABETS__. More code lives under __GH_UNDIVISIBLE__ and __GH_SEMITECH__.

items.title: GPUI + runtime
items.description: __CREPUS__ — first GPUI-native componentry with hot reload; __CREPUS_DSL__ plus __CREPUS_REACT__.

items.title: Extensions without JS
items.description: __CREPUS_WEBEXT__ — plug-and-play MV3 from Rust, not a JS/TS web-code pipeline.

items.title: FFI for C languages
items.description: __EQUILIBRIUM__ — call C-compiling languages from Rust like native libraries.
